description: Graduated with a Bachelor's Pass, building a strong academic foundation in Mathematics and Sciences that sparked a lifelong passion for technology.
storyText: This is where it all began. In the classrooms of Bisho, a curiosity for how things work took root. A Bachelor's Pass wasn't just a certificate — it was a launchpad. The discipline of study, the thrill of problem-solving, and the first glimpse of what technology could do set the trajectory for everything that followed.

description: Completed a Higher Certificate in Information and Communication Technology, mastering the fundamentals of computing, networking, and introductory programming.
storyText: Cape Town opened a new chapter. The Higher Certificate was an immersion into the digital world — learning how systems communicate, how data flows, and how software is born from logic. Every lab session, every late-night study sprint built the technical vocabulary I'd need for what came next.

description: Currently pursuing a Diploma in Application Development, specializing in full-stack development with Java 21, MySQL, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Building real-world projects in agile team environments.
storyText: This is the forge. Application Development isn't just about writing code — it's about engineering solutions. From ride-hailing platforms to clinic booking systems, every project is a lesson in collaboration, architecture, and impact. The diploma is the framework, but the real education happens in the trenches of team sprints and production-ready code.

description: Actively expanding skills through hands-on projects, open-source exploration, online courses, and community engagement in the developer ecosystem.
storyText: Education never stops. Every new framework explored, every Stack Overflow answer that clicks, every agile retrospective that reveals a better way — it's all part of the journey. The classroom is everywhere, and the curriculum is written by curiosity.
